Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Plaintiff Hus Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; And Request For Sanctions Against Defendants Komendi Kosasih And Allan Young And Their Attorneys Of Record Nils Rosenquest And Stuart Bronstein In The Amount Of $2,875
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Andy Liu, Esq. (650.475.6289; Andy.Liu@AptumLaw.us) for moving parties/Cross-Complainants.
Nils Rosenquest, Esq. (415.292.0980; rosenquest@earthlink.net) for Defendants.

BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The non-moving party, Defendants, did not contest the tentative. The moving party, Plaintiffs, contested to the extent the tentative did not state a date by which Defendants would produce responsive documents. Defendants volunteered that they could make their production by tomorrow.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS MENGZHEN SUN and CHENG HU's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; And Request For Sanctions Against Defendants Komendi Kosasih And Allan Young And Their Attorneys Of Record Nils Rosenquest And Stuart Bronstein In The Amount Of $2,875:

The Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is DENIED AS MOOT, without prejudice to Plaintiffs filing a new motion regarding the substance of the responses that Defendants served on November 14, 2022.

The Request for Sanctions is DENIED.

Moving parties will submit a proposed order to Defendants and the pro tem that adopts the tentative but adds that Defendants will produce responsive documents by this coming Friday, December 9th.

Judge Pro Tem: Matthew Kahn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

DEMURRER to ANSWER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Nils Rosenquest, 415.292.0980 of Rosenquest and Associates appearing for Defendant Komendi Kosasih.
Jinyi Gi, 650.475.6289 of Aptum Laq.us appearing via Zoom fro Plaintiff Mengzhen Sun.

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS-COMPLAINANTS MENGZHEN SUN, CHENG HU AND SOMA HUB, LLC'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Moving party also failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B.
Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER to ANSWER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Nils Rosenquest, 415.292.0980 of Rosenquest and Associates appearing for Defendant Komendi Kosasih.
Jinyi Gi, 650.475.6289 of Aptum Laq.us appearing via Zoom fro Plaintiff Mengzhen Sun.

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS-DEFENDANTS KOMENDI KOSASIH AND ALLAN YOUNG'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Proof of service is also defective attesting to motion papers being placed in a sealed envelopes and "caused" to be emailed from an undisclosed e-mail address. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Amended Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right Of Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment Against Defendant Allan Young
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Zhen "Andy" Liu; Aptum Law; 650-475-6289; appearing on behalf of plaintiffs Mengzhen Sun and Cheng Hu.
Nils Rosenquest; Rosenquest & Associates; 415-292-0980; appearing on behalf of defendants Komendi Kosasih and Allan Young.

Plaintiffs' counsel contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS' AMENDED NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT ALLAN YOUNG is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to show that this action contains a claim for money based on an express or implied contract where the total amount of such claim is a fixed or "readily ascertainable."

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
